title: Your Creativity. Masonry Generates the Rest.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~23s. Featured brand: Girlfriend Collective. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DSyLAzmjbm5). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry proof-and-reframe reel for Girlfriend Collective. Every frame is generated in Masonry following the 'Make in Masonry' step, then cut per the Edit / Transition / SFX direction. Opener looks like a shoot, then the pivot: this is Masonry, sharp detail, real texture, ready for every campaign colorway. Then the barrier falls: it is not about budget, it is about imagining, directing, and generating what your brand already has. That is your creativity. That is how smart brands scale in Masonry.
audio: Bright, aspirational electronic track with a light pulse. Audio-only: no voiceover. Cut every super to the beat; satisfying swoosh on the colorway swap.

beats.super: Single word, clean sans, fade up.
beats.visual: Model in Girlfriend Collective's ribbed set, outdoors, natural light. Curiosity hook.
beats.masonry: Upload Girlfriend Collective's ribbed set product shot to the Masonry product library. Prompt 'sustainable activewear editorial, model outdoors, natural light, 9:16.' Generate the opener.
beats.edit: Slow push-in on the outdoor editorial.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0: 'this' single-word opener over a clean editorial shot.

beats.super: Full reveal, 'Masonry' emphasized in the accent color, scale-in.
beats.visual: Same model, same frame. Full reveal text fades in.
beats.masonry: Same generation, add 'this is Masonry.' Optional 0.3s Generate-button screen-record.
beats.edit: Hold the same frame; optional Generate flash.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 1: 'this is AI' reveal on the same editorial frame.

beats.ost: it's no longer plastic and robotic
beats.visual: Model in a flowing pink set, confident organic movement. Nothing looks artificial.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'flowing pink set, organic movement, soft daylight.' Generate 3; Masonry keeps the model and fabric consistent.
beats.edit: Three cuts of flowing movement, micro push-ins.
beats.sfx: Tick per segment; the upbeat groove enters.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2-4: 'it's no longer / plastic skin / robotic movements' across three cuts.

beats.ost: sharp detail. real texture. crystal clear.
beats.super: Each word snaps in on its macro cut.
beats.visual: Three proof cuts: close-up eye, ribbed-fabric macro, full outfit tack-sharp against nature.
beats.masonry: Three proof generations: 'macro eye,' 'ribbed-fabric texture macro,' 'full outfit tack-sharp in nature.' Batch for a matching trio.
beats.edit: Three fast macro cuts with a zoom-punch on each.
beats.sfx: Crisp tick and whoosh on each; energy rises.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 5-7: 'it's sharp detail / real texture / and crystal clear' proof trio.

beats.super: Centered, fade. Hold steady through the color swap.
beats.visual: Same product shown in two Masonry-generated colorways. Same model, same product, different palette.
beats.masonry: On-brand-scale beat: in Masonry duplicate the shot and Recolor the set to two campaign colorways. Same model, same product, two palettes, generated.
beats.edit: Same shot duplicated; a quick Recolor wipe swaps the set's color across the frame.
beats.transition: Color-swipe wipe between the two colorways.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8-9: '[for] / for your campaigns' showing the practical output for brands.

beats.ost: it's no longer about who has the marketing budget
beats.super: Words build over the wide, lower-third.
beats.visual: Four cuts in natural, expansive settings, phrase building word by word.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'expansive natural setting, model walking, editorial wide.' Generate one scene and cut the four budget-line beats over it.
beats.edit: One continuous expansive walking wide; text across the four beats.
beats.transition: Hard cuts on the beat within the scene.
beats.sfx: Low drone for the barrier line.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 10-13: 'it's / no longer about / who has the / marketing budget' phrase build.

beats.ost: it's about imagining. directing. and generating.
beats.super: Three words, each snaps in on its action cut.
beats.visual: Three purposeful cuts: directed close-up, a pose adjustment, then a Masonry generation appearing.
beats.masonry: Three actions: a directed close-up generation, a pose tweak via Masonry's Restyle, then a 0.5s screen-record of a Masonry generation rendering in.
beats.edit: Directed close-up, a Restyle pose tweak, then the generation rendering in.
beats.transition: Quick cuts; a subtle UI flash on the generation.
beats.sfx: UI click on the generate; build.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 14-16: 'it's about imagining / directing / and generating' three-beat action sequence.

beats.ost: what already exists. it's your creativity.
beats.super: Two-line build, fade; 'it's your creativity' lands bold.
beats.visual: Existing product dropped into Masonry: it recognizes the recycled-fabric texture, the palette, the model. Input, output, iteration.
beats.masonry: Drop Girlfriend Collective's actual recycled-fabric product into Masonry and show it pick up the texture and palette, then the on-brand output. Input, output, iterate.
beats.edit: Product drop, output reveal, iteration: input / output / iterate cuts.
beats.transition: Soft match-cut from the real product to the generated output.
beats.sfx: Gentle 'recognize' chime as Masonry picks up the texture.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 17-19: 'what already exists / it's your / it's your creativity' product-input reveal.

beats.ost: that's how smart brands scale in 2026.
beats.super: 'that's' then the bold close line, then the Masonry wordmark.
beats.visual: Three closing cuts: 'that's' single word, wide hero of the full look, then the Masonry wordmark end card.
beats.masonry: Close: 'that's,' a wide hero generation of the full Girlfriend Collective look, then the Masonry wordmark end card.
beats.edit: Wide hero of the full look, clean cut to the end card.
beats.transition: Final hard cut to the end card; hold.
beats.sfx: Final impact; music resolves into the outro.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 20-22: 'that's / that's how smart brands / scale in 2026' closing statement.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Girlfriend Collective's recycled-fabric sets into the Masonry product library and set the earthy brand palette. (2) Generate each beat with its 'Make in Masonry' prompt; use Recolor for the colorway beat and Restyle to keep the model consistent. (3) Edit per beat following the Super style, Edit / Motion, Transition and SFX direction; cut every super to the bright track, audio-only with no voiceover. Girlfriend Collective is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
